'''Gliders''' were lizard-like carnivores native to [[Orellon II]] They had a cape of skin between their limbs which allowed them to silently glide through the air from the trees that they resided in and onto their prey.<ref name="TP" />

They were intelligent, perhaps quasi-sentient, and hunted in packs. One glider would attack a herd of prey to make them enter into a state of panic whereupon the rest of the gliders attacks seconds later.<ref name="TP" />

Gliders had excellent visual senses as well as auditory and olfactory ones.<ref name="TP" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}
